t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-top:15px;

p.t-esc: ', '.join(journal.get('code') or 'ALL' for journal in js_data['ks_df_informations']['journals'] if journal.get('selected'))
', '.join(account.get('name') or 'ALL' for account in js_data['ks_df_informations']['account'] if account.get('selected'))
', '.join(journal.get('code') or '' for journal in js_data['ks_df_informations']['journals'] if journal.get('selected'))
', '.join(account.get('name') or '' for account in js_data['ks_df_informations']['account'] if account.get('selected'))

table.class: pims_report_line_table pims_report_content border mb-0 ks_table_4_pdf table

table.style: border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-size: 11px; color: #000; border: none;

tr.t-att-style: 'page-break-inside: avoid;color:#000;font-weight: bold; border-bottom: %s' % ('1px solid #000;' if js_data['ks_df_informations']['ks_report_with_lines'] else '1px solid #ccc;')

t.t-if: js_data['ks_df_informations']['ks_report_with_lines'] and not sub_line['initial_bal'] and not sub_line['ending_bal']

table.style: border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-size: 10px; color: #000; border: none;

tr.t-att-style: 'page-break-inside: avoid;color: #000;font-weight: bold; border-bottom: %s' % ('1px solid #000;' if js_data['ks_df_informations']['ks_report_with_lines'] else '1px solid #ccc;')

t.t-if: js_data['ks_df_informations']['ks_report_with_lines'] and not sub_line['initial_bal'] and not sub_line['ending_bal']

p.t-esc: ', '.join(journal.get('code') or '' for journal in js_data['ks_df_informations']['journals'] if journal.get('selected'))
', '.join(acc.get('name') or '' for acc in js_data['ks_df_informations']['account_type'] if acc.get('selected'))
', '.join( lt or '' for lt in js_data['ks_df_informations']['ks_selected_partner_name']) if js_data['ks_df_informations']['ks_selected_partner_name'] else 'All'

table.class: pims_report_line_table table ks-data-table-age mb-o ks-data-table-age_pdf border pims_report_content

p.t-esc: ','.join(journal.get('code') or '' for journal in js_data['ks_df_informations']['journals'] if journal.get('selected'))
','.join(account.get('name') or '' for account in js_data['ks_df_informations']['account'] if account.get('selected'))

table.class: pims_report_line_table pims_report_content border mb-0 table ks_table_cj0_pdf

table.style: border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-size: 10px; color: #000; border: none;
border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; font-size:10px; color:#000; border:none;
border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; font-size:10px; color:#000; border:none;
